description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style perfume bottle made of white porcelain or ceramic, featuring hand-painted decorative scenes and gold accents. The bottle has a rectangular body with softly rounded shoulders and a short neck, topped by a matching, intricately shaped stopper. On the front and back, there are framed painted vignettes: one side depicts a pastoral landscape with a house, trees, and a river, while the other side shows a sailing ship and a similar landscape. The remaining two sides are adorned with gold star-like patterns and embossed decorative borders. The bottle's surface is glossy and smooth, with delicate relief work and gold embellishments enhancing its luxurious appearance. The overall design suggests a collectible or antique item, likely intended for display as much as for use.
description: A white porcelain perfume bottle with gold accents, hand-painted landscape scenes, and an ornate stopper. The bottle is rectangular with embossed and gilded decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view shows a painted pastoral scene with a house, trees, and water, framed by gold and embossed borders.
description_view_1: Side view displays gold star-like patterns and embossed borders, with no painted scene.
description_view_2: Back view features a painted scene of a sailing ship and landscape, framed similarly to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows only gold star-like patterns and embossed borders, mirroring view 1.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The bottle cap is a matching porcelain stopper, rounded and slightly domed with a flared base, decorated with gold accents and a painted motif on top. It appears removable and fits snugly into the neck of the bottle.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: Rectangular with rounded shoulders and a short neck, topped by a wide, ornate stopper; the silhouette is symmetrical and gently contoured.
attribute_decorative_elements: Hand-painted landscape scenes framed on two sides
Gold leaf accents and star-like patterns
Ornate, matching stopper with gold detailing
